seo.welcomeDescription: Discover the open-source alternative to OneDrive
seo.authDescription: Sign in to your next favorite app
seo.explorerDescription: Browse your files stored in the cloud with the file explorer
seo.terminalDescription: Discover a new way to browse your files in a terminal-like interface

welcome.heroDesc: NohamDrive is an open-source alternative to OneDrive built for teams. Explore, share and manage your files from an integrated terminal and an intuitive interface, securely.
welcome.featuresHeadingMobile: Everything you need to manage your team files
welcome.echoLead: A revolutionary way to navigate your folders and files,

advancedExplorer.title: Advanced file explorer
advancedExplorer.description: Browse your files like on your computer, with an integrated terminal for fast and precise management.

secureSharing.title: Secure sharing & collaboration
secureSharing.description: Share files or folders in one click, with customizable permissions and a change history.

openSource.title: 100% Open-Source
openSource.description: Transparent, moddable and auditable code. Join the community to contribute or tailor NohamDrive to your needs.

terminalEcho.title: Echo Terminal
terminalEcho.description: Manage your files via command line directly in the cloud, like on a Linux system.

realtimeCollab.title: Real-time collaboration
realtimeCollab.description: Share, comment and edit together, with instant notifications and a change history.

security.title: Security & privacy
security.description: Your data is encrypted and protected. Control access and permissions for every team member.

testimonials.t1: Eh ben voyons ! NohamDrive has revolutionized the way we manage the deportation of Niggas back to their home countries. The built-in terminal is a game-changer: finally, an open-source alternative to OneDrive that meets our technical needs!
testimonials.t2: I was rejected from art school when I was younger. The integration with Minio and the Linux-like terminal won me over: it’s the tool I’ve been missing for my projects
testimonials.t3: C'EST LE TRAIN DE LA HYYYYYPE !! Johan loves this app! It helps us organize our tasting videos
testimonials.t4: Ever since I started using NohamDrive, I am the danger. Thanks to NohamDrive, Skyler is better at handling money laundering—and, most importantly, she keeps her mouth shut.
testimonials.t6: Integrating it with our existing infrastructure (PostgreSQL + Docker) was a breeze. Performance is excellent, even with large files. Old my cup of tea
testimonials.t7: Ha ha, don't you think it's wonderful, my dear! This app is really beautiful, and I really like it. It saves so much time!
testimonials.t9: Finally, a tool that combines simplicity and power! My teams love exploring the kids... er, the files, and I sleep soundly thanks to the built-in encryption ; ).
testimonials.t10: Honestly, I really liked it—it wasn't too hard to set up! My Mac was what slowed me down the most. I don't really know how it works, but I imagine it's good.
testimonials.t11: I love NohamDrive! And I love France—Macron is a nice guy. Make NohamDrive great again!!
testimonials.t12: Windows is crap—everyone knows it! That’s why I decided to use the best alternative to OneDrive (that piece of crap): NohamDrive! I like this app almost as much as Linux

reset.title: Reset settings
reset.desc: This will restore the default preferences on this device.
reset.detail: This only affects the current browser / desktop app profile. No server data is changed.
